title: Partial class in C# (partial modifier)
summary: Think about a situation where two or more developers need to modify the same class or add new functionalities to the same class. Or assume they need to implement interfaces to the same class. There will be a merge conflict which needs to be resolved manually or using some tool.
content: Think about a situation where two or more developers need to modify the same class or add new functionalities to the same class. Or assume they need to implement interfaces to the same class. There will be a merge conflict which needs to be resolved manually or using some tool.
